# Server Profile

## BlackroseWoW Identity

BlackroseWoW is a blizzlike hardcore Wrath of the Lich King (3.3.5a) server
built on AzerothCore.

## Core Direction

- Blizzlike-first gameplay experience
- Hardcore-oriented realm rules and progression
- Curated custom content without abandoning WotLK fundamentals
- Stable operations and maintainable server tooling

## Technical Base

- Core framework: AzerothCore
- Expansion target: WoW 3.3.5a (WotLK)
- Languages: C++ and SQL
- Deployment target: Linux/WSL-based workflows

## Project Scope

BlackroseWoW keeps the upstream AzerothCore foundation and applies
server-specific gameplay, configuration, and operational customizations.
